title: TechSaksham is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: TechSaksham is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Join the TechSaksham family as a Subject Matter Expert in Kolkata. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About TechSaksham:
TechSaksham is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TechSaksham!
